title: Prospectus
content:
In salt flats,
        idle pools
        bunching off the ocean,
        multi-legged crabs, worsted stalks -
        sea crimson weed
        weigh the panoply
        to heighten my deepening fervour.

        In the bedrock shanks
        of spread tidal basins
        clothed in spools of enveloping
        brackish water,
        a plethora teeming with aqua towns
        and untold gadgetry exists -
        replete with mimicry
        including primeval
        flotilla tanks
        and broadsheets for spreading
        their way of life.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Paul Cameron Brown, titled "Prospectus", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
